opinion.h4: GEORGE ET AL. v. CLEMMONS, SHERIFF. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF LOUISIANA. No. 975. Decided May 13, 1963.
opinion.p: Robert L. Carter and Johnnie A. Jones for petitioners.
Jack P. F. Gremillion, Attorney General of Louisiana, for respondent.
The petition for writ of certiorari is granted and the judgment is reversed. Johnson v. Virginia, ante, p. 61. Cf. Thompson v. Louisville, 362 U.S. 199.
373 U.S. 241 ABERNATHY ET AL. v. CARPENTER, DIRECTOR OF REVENUE FOR MISSOURI. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE WESTERN DISTRICT OF MISSOURI. No. 905. Decided May 13, 1963.
Thomas F. Eagleton, Attorney General of Missouri, and Robert D. Kingsland and Albert J. Stephan, Jr., Assistant Attorneys General, for appellee.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
